data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Adapts the layout based on user screen size and orientation.
data.technical_spec: Uses CSS media queries and flexible grid layouts.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Modular services communicate over a network to function as a cohesive application.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using REST APIs and container orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Distributes content geographically for faster access.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Akamai or another CDN service for asset delivery.

data.title: Single Page Application
data.description: Offers a seamless experience without full-page reloads.
data.technical_spec: Built using frameworks like React or Angular.

data.title: Cloud Architecture
data.description: Leverages cloud infrastructure for scalability and performance.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS or Azure for cloud services integration.
